productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Sprint Speed White Universal Red Shoe
description: CompositionWhite, grey and universal red synthetic leather shoes with ridged, multi-directional rubber outsole, EVA sockliner and comfort cushioning on the insoleWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washMade for those who love comfort and style, these white synthetic leather shoes from adidas are a comfortable wear for runners. The multi-directional outsole made of durable rubber protects the feet from impact on hard surfaces. The EVA sockliner coupled with a comfort cushioning on the insole ensures  the feet are safe from shock, while the mesh upper enhances breathability. Added to these features is the red along the grey stripes, giving it a glam look. Perfect for urban wear.
